title: Speaker request form for organizations - Bank of Canada
content:
## Speaker request form for organizations
Use this form to invite a Bank representative to speak at your event.
- Include as much detail as possible. Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are mandatory.
- For a virtual or in-person presentation for high school, college and university students that introduces the Bank of Canada, refer to the Central Bank in Your Classroom .
- If you have any questions regarding this form, contact Stakeholder Relations .
Personal information collected by the Bank of Canada is protected under the Privacy Act . The information you provide is used to respond to your inquiry. For further information about the Bank of Canada’s privacy practices, please consult the Bank’s General Privacy Policy .
